## Summary

Describe the public website change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:a11y`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Public-evidence boundaries

- [ ] No credentials, private infrastructure, server paths, addresses, accounts, certificate topology, backup locations, customer details, or internal strategy
- [ ] No unsupported customer, revenue, funding, staffing, traction, or launch claims
- [ ] Screenshots and assets have documented ownership and contain no private data
- [ ] Deployment and repository-setting changes are separately approved
